name: event-attendees-csv-lambda
description: Lambda function for event attendees CSV report

scripts.prebuild: rm -rf shared index.js index.js.map 2>/dev/null; mkdir -p shared/db shared/utils && cp ../../../../../shared/db/*.d.ts shared/db/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../../../../shared/utils/*.d.ts shared/utils/ 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.build: tsc --noEmitOnError false 2>&1; EXIT_CODE=$?; npm run copy-shared && npm run fix-paths; if [ -f index.js ]; then exit 0; else exit ${EXIT_CODE}; fi
scripts.copy-shared: mkdir -p shared/db shared/utils && cp ../../../../../shared/db/*.js shared/db/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../../../../shared/utils/*.js shared/utils/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../../../../shared/db/*.d.ts shared/db/ 2>/dev/null; cp ../../../../../shared/utils/*.d.ts shared/utils/ 2>/dev/null; true
